internal_projects.title: Money Movement Monitoring
internal_projects.description: Developed a backend-driven monitoring solution that provides visibility into daily Money Movement volumes and helps identify missed requests, including client-requested transactions that were not fulfilled by the bank. The system supports data consolidation, service manager-level reporting, and process tracking to improve operational visibility and reporting accuracy.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Leave Experience Mini-CRM
internal_projects.description: Built an internal mini-CRM application that streamlines the handling of employee leave and time-off requests, including parental, medical, bereavement, and other leave types. The tool helps teams manage reminders, tasks, and workflow actions involving employees, HR, and clients, improving process organization and reducing manual follow-ups.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Payment Process Analysis
internal_projects.description: Developed a process analysis dashboard focused on tracking average monthly payment volumes, manual processing time, and recurring pre-submission errors. The solution helps teams identify inefficiencies, monitor error trends, and support data-driven process improvement initiatives.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Snowflake Quality Report Automation
internal_projects.description: Created an automated reporting solution that extracts data from Snowflake and generates structured quality reports in Excel. This project reduced manual reporting effort, improved consistency, and helped teams monitor data quality and operational performance more efficiently.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: New Hire Experience
internal_projects.description: Built an internal tracking and reporting solution for monitoring new hire progress, including licensing status, quiz performance, and management reporting. The system provides better visibility into onboarding readiness and helps management track compliance and training progress more effectively.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Ticket Auto-Assignment and Workforce Management Dashboard
internal_projects.description: Designed and developed an automated ticket assignment and workforce management solution that routes tickets based on stakeholder-defined rules and operational conditions. The platform includes a real-time dashboard for monitoring ticket flow, assignment status, and worker availability, while allowing managers to enable or disable specific workers from receiving tickets. This improved workload balancing, operational control, and real-time visibility across the team.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

internal_projects.title: Location Mapping
internal_projects.description: Developed a location mapping solution designed to visualize and manage location-based operational data through a responsive web interface. The application supports structured data handling, mapping-related workflows, and backend integration for improved usability and operational reference.
internal_projects.note: Internal enterprise project; live demo not publicly available.

other_works.title: Invoice Generator
other_works.description: Developed a Python-based invoice generation tool that creates professional PDF invoices from Excel source data and supporting evidence images stored in a folder. The solution automates document generation, organizes supporting attachments, and helps reduce manual formatting work for invoice preparation.

other_works.title: My Portfolio
other_works.description: Built a personal portfolio website with a premium dark UI to showcase projects, skills, career background, and development work in a polished modern interface. The site was developed using Next.js and TypeScript, with content structured for maintainability and presentation quality. It also includes an OpenAI-powered chatbot that answers portfolio-related questions in a more interactive and personalized way, reflecting a practical blend of frontend development and AI-assisted user experience design.
